title: Delete CLI writeJsonAtomically duplicate; use shared
description: CLI has its own writeJsonAtomically helper (init.ts:1556-1560) that duplicates atomicWriteText logic. Delete the CLI-local helper and route its callers (~3 sites in init.ts) to atomicWriteJson from shared. Helper consolidation; pure refactor.
scope: Layer 1 foundation — atomic helper migration (CLI side)

files.change: Delete writeJsonAtomically helper at lines 1556-1560. Add import { atomicWriteJson } from @fenglimg/fabric-shared/node/atomic-write. Replace all callers (~3 sites) of writeJsonAtomically with atomicWriteJson.

criteria: All callers in init.ts now use atomicWriteJson from shared
No behavioral change (same tmp+rename + JSON serialization)
init flow integration test passes (if exists)
